scripts.dev:server: node -e "const {spawn}=require('child_process'); const path=require('path'); const root=process.cwd().replace(/^\\\\\\?\\/,''); const child=spawn(process.platform==='win32'?'npm.cmd':'npm',['run','dev'],{cwd:path.join(root,'server'),stdio:'inherit'}); child.on('exit',code=>process.exit(code??1)); child.on('error',error=>{console.error(error.message); process.exit(1);});"
scripts.dev:client: node -e "const {spawn}=require('child_process'); const path=require('path'); const root=process.cwd().replace(/^\\\\\\?\\/,''); const child=spawn(process.platform==='win32'?'npm.cmd':'npm',['run','dev'],{cwd:path.join(root,'client'),stdio:'inherit'}); child.on('exit',code=>process.exit(code??1)); child.on('error',error=>{console.error(error.message); process.exit(1);});"
scripts.build:client: node -e "const {spawn}=require('child_process'); const path=require('path'); const root=process.cwd().replace(/^\\\\\\?\\/,''); const child=spawn(process.platform==='win32'?'npm.cmd':'npm',['run','build'],{cwd:path.join(root,'client'),stdio:'inherit'}); child.on('exit',code=>process.exit(code??1)); child.on('error',error=>{console.error(error.message); process.exit(1);});"
